class="content-wrap"> <div class="code-block code-block-1" style="margin: 8px 0; clear: both;"> <h1 style="font-size: 28px;  text-align: center;color:#1c8017;" itemprop="headline">QUEER ADVENTURERS</h1><p style="font-size: 16px;  text-align: center;width:80%;margin:auto;" itemprop="description"><i>LGBTQ Travel + Outdoor Adventures</i></p></div> <article id="post-1696" class="entry content-bg single-entry post-1696 page type-page status-publish has-post-thumbnail hentry grow-content-main grow-content-body"> <div class="entry-content-wrap"> <div class="entry-content single-content"> <p>Queer Adventurers is an outdoor travel blog for LGTBQ people. Whatever labels and pronouns you use, you are welcome here!</p> <p>Here, you’ll find LGBTQ guides to destinations around the world, packed with recommendations, itineraries, packing lists, and everything you need to know to plan your trip. </p> <p>You’ll also find general travel resources on choosing gear, understanding which brands and companies support the queer community, and traveling joyfully as your full self.</p> <p>Want to know more about me? </p> <div class="wp-block-media-text is-stacked-on-mobile is-vertically-aligned-center"><figure class="wp-block-media-text__media"><img data-dominant-color="979694" data-has-transparency="false" style="--dominant-color: #979694;" fetchpriority="high" decoding="async" width="300" height="225" src="data:image/png;base64," alt="A person
